summary: The source paper (arXiv:2102.04994) proves that $\{C_6, \overline{C_6}\}$ and $\{C_7, \overline{C_7}\}$ each have the Erdős-Hajnal property, but explicitly leaves open whether the same holds for $\{C_8, \overline{C_8}\}$. A wide search of the post-2021 literature — including a survey of new Erdős-Hajnal results through 2024–2025 and a review of the key follow-up paper arXiv:2307.06455 — found no work resolving this question. The conjecture remains open as of May 2026.
search_queries: Erdős-Hajnal property C8 complement 8-cycle graph theory 2102.04994
Erdos-Hajnal property C8 overline C8 hole graph Chudnovsky Scott Seymour Spirkl
Erdos-Hajnal property even cycle C8 graph 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026
notes: No follow-up paper resolving the conjecture was found. The conjecture was posted in 2021 as an explicit open problem; the related arXiv:2307.06455 ('New graphs with the Erdős-Hajnal property') does not mention C8. Absence of evidence is strong given the conjecture's specificity and the breadth of the search.
